[4:06 pm on 23 January, 2023] Deborah: Congrats! Last week I visited a place that holds a lot of memories for me. It was my mother`s old house.
[4:06 pm on 23 January, 2023] Jolene: Why does it hold such special memories for you?
[4:06 pm on 23 January, 2023] Deborah: It was full of memories, she passed away a few years ago. This is our last photo together.
[4:06 pm on 23 January, 2023] Jolene: Sorry about your loss, Deb. My mother also passed away last year. This is my room in her house, I also have many memories there. Is there anything special about it you remember?
[4:06 pm on 23 January, 2023] Deborah: My mom's house had a special bench near the window. She loved to sit there every morning and take in the view. I come to sit here sometimes, it helps me stay connected to her.

[9:49 am on 27 January, 2023] Deborah: That's my old home. I go there now and then for my mom, who passed away. Sitting in that spot by the window gives me peace.
[9:49 am on 27 January, 2023] Jolene: Must be great to have that place where you feel connected to her.
[9:49 am on 27 January, 2023] Deborah: Yeah, it's special. I can feel her presence when I sit there and it comforts me.
[9:49 am on 27 January, 2023] Jolene: Wow, it sounds like that spot holds a lot of sentimental value. Does it bring back any special memories?
[9:49 am on 27 January, 2023] Deborah: Yeah, Jolene. She'd sit there every night with a book and a smile, reading was one of her hobbies. It was one of her favorite places in the house.

[9:49 am on 27 January, 2023] Deborah: Hey Jolene, sorry to tell you this but my dad passed away two days ago. It's been really tough on us all - his sudden death left us all kinda shell-shocked. I'm trying to channel my grief by spending more time with family and cherishing the memories. These moments remind me to live life fully.
[9:49 am on 27 January, 2023] Jolene: Sorry to hear about your dad, Deborah. Losing a parent is tough - how's it going for you and your family?
[9:49 am on 27 January, 2023] Deborah: Even though it's hard, it's comforting to look back on the great memories. We looked at the family album. Photos give me peace during difficult times. This is my parents' wedding in 1993.
[9:49 am on 27 January, 2023] Jolene: They were a beautiful couple!
[9:49 am on 27 January, 2023] Deborah: My husband and I are trying to be as good a family as my parents were!

[4:06 pm on 23 January, 2023] Deborah: Yoga helped me find peace during a rough time, and now I'm passionate about sharing that with others.
[4:06 pm on 23 January, 2023] Jolene: It is truly inspiring!
[4:06 pm on 23 January, 2023] Deborah: Gotta run, bye!
[4:06 pm on 23 January, 2023] Jolene: Looking forward to the next chat!

I'm trying to channel my grief by spending more time with family and cherishing the memories. These moments remind me to live life fully.

results.question: What helped Deborah find peace when grieving deaths of her loved ones?
results.gold: yoga, old photos, the roses and dahlias in a flower garden, nature
results.predicted: Based on the memories, Deborah found peace through several practices when grieving: spending time in nature at meaningful locations (like a spot by the water near her mom's old house), carrying and holding an amulet that belonged to her loved one, practicing yoga and meditation, creating and engaging with art, and spending quality time with family. She also found comfort in cherishing memories and reflecting on the lives of those she lost.

chunks:
[7:03 pm on 1 February, 2023] Jolene: When I got it, I felt a mix of emotions - excited and nervous. But now, I'm really enjoying it! It's like trying to solve a puzzle, figuring out the best design and programming. Seeing the robot come together is awesome too!
[7:03 pm on 1 February, 2023] Deborah: That's awesome, Jolene! You're enjoying the process. It must be really satisfying to see it come together. Keep up the good work! Oh, by the way, I met my new neighbor Anna yesterday!
[7:03 pm on 1 February, 2023] Jolene: How did you two meet?
[7:03 pm on 1 February, 2023] Deborah: It happened at yoga in the park.
[7:03 pm on 1 February, 2023] Jolene: Wow, that's awesome! It's great connecting with people who have similar interests. Did you two talk about it?

[9:48 am on 4 February, 2023] Deborah: Anna also has a pendant that she wears in memory of her mother! This also brought us closer.
[9:48 am on 4 February, 2023] Jolene: It's nice to have those reminders as a source of strength when we need it.
[9:48 am on 4 February, 2023] Deborah: Life's tough but hang in there. Look to your sources of strength and you'll do great. Stay in touch, take care of yourself, and know I'm always here to cheer you on!
[9:48 am on 4 February, 2023] Jolene: Thanks, Deb! Your encouragement means a lot to me. I'll definitely stay in touch. Bye, take care and keep shining!
[9:48 am on 4 February, 2023] Deborah: Stay safe!  Bye!

[9:48 am on 4 February, 2023] Deborah: We were trying out different dance poses, like Warrior II, which builds strength and boosts focus.
[9:48 am on 4 February, 2023] Jolene: Is it difficult to do?
[9:48 am on 4 February, 2023] Deborah: Yes, but this brought us closer to Anna! We supported each other, that means a lot.
[9:48 am on 4 February, 2023] Jolene: Can you explain how to do it?
[9:48 am on 4 February, 2023] Deborah: Sure! To do this modified pose, sit on the edge of a chair with your feet planted. Twist your torso to one side and use your hand on your knee for support. You'll feel a stretch in your back and shoulders as you hold it for a few breaths, then switch sides. It's great for relaxing tense muscles.

results.question: When did Deborah start the yoga class in the neighborhood?
results.predicted:
Based on the memories, Deborah hosted her first yoga class for her neighbors on **Friday, 10 March 2023**. 

She discussed this class with Jolene on 13 March 2023, referring to it as having happened "the other day" on Friday. She then organized additional yoga events and bought new props for the class on 28 March 2023, indicating the class continued after that initial session.
chunks:
[11:22 am on 13 March, 2023] Deborah: So much has been going on lately. I started this yoga class in the neighborhood - it's such a good feeling! Now I get to share the exercise with my neighbors and watch it really transform them.
[11:22 am on 13 March, 2023] Jolene:  Congrats. How did you do this?
[11:22 am on 13 March, 2023] Deborah: Thanks! My neighbors were interested in trying yoga, so I hosted a class for them on Friday. It was great to see everyone embrace and enjoy it. Here is our photo together.
[11:22 am on 13 March, 2023] Jolene: That's cool! What made you want to start teaching it?
[11:22 am on 13 March, 2023] Deborah: I find it calming and wanted to share that with others. Giving people peace and awareness brings me so much happiness.

[7:18 pm on 2 March, 2023] Jolene: Thanks, Deb! This really cheered me up. All the best with your classes. Bye!
[7:18 pm on 2 March, 2023] Deborah: Thanks, Jolene! Glad I could bring a smile to your face. Take care and make sure to give yourself some time to relax. Bye!
[11:22 am on 13 March, 2023] Deborah: Hi Jolene! We haven't corresponded for a long time!
[11:22 am on 13 March, 2023] Jolene: Hey Deb, yeah life can get chaotic. How's it been going lately?
[11:22 am on 13 March, 2023] Deborah: So much has been going on lately. I started this yoga class in the neighborhood - it's such a good feeling! Now I get to share the exercise with my neighbors and watch it really transform them.

[2:14 pm on 3 September, 2023] Deborah: Relationships with family and friends are so vital. My yoga pals have been my second family - we've held each other up through a lot. The other day I found this old photo. That was when I first started doing yoga. My mum was my biggest fan and source of motivation. She'd often come to my classes with me.
[2:14 pm on 3 September, 2023] Jolene: Our loved ones sure are supportive! When I was 10, my parents got me that and it was the start of my passion for video games.
[2:14 pm on 3 September, 2023] Deborah: Cool that they shared that with you. Did you learn on your own or did they teach you?
[2:14 pm on 3 September, 2023] Jolene: I taught myself, but my dad was always supportive and my mom would play games with me. 
[2:14 pm on 3 September, 2023] Deborah: That's awesome! Sounds like you had a lot of support from your parents. What was your favorite game to play with mom?

results.question: What time management techniques do Deborah and Jolene use?
results.gold: the Pomodoro Technique - 25 minutes work and 5-minute break, scheduler or to-do list, The Eisenhower Matrix, bullet journal
results.predicted:
Based on the memories, both use several techniques:

**Deborah** uses: daily schedules/to-do lists, the Eisenhower Matrix (which prioritizes tasks by urgency and importance), and breaking tasks into smaller pieces with goal-setting.

**Jolene** uses: the Pomodoro Technique (25 minutes work, 5-minute breaks), bullet journaling for tracking tasks, and maintaining a routine that includes scheduled time for classes, studying, and personal self-care activities like yoga and meditation.

[12:52 am on 19 August, 2023] Jolene: Life's been hella busy since we last talked. I bought a console for my partner as a gift on the 17th and it's so much fun, he even managed to play it.! Engineering studies are still going strong too. Balance has been key for me lately. How about you? What's been up?
[12:52 am on 19 August, 2023] Deborah:  Well done! As for me, I've been focusing on teaching yoga and spending time with the community. Organizing a yoga event last month was really cool.
[12:52 am on 19 August, 2023] Jolene:  Was it rewarding seeing everyone come together? Can you tell me more about how you put it together? Also, any tips for maintaining a balance between hobbies and studies?
[12:52 am on 19 August, 2023] Deborah:  I reached out to different nearby businesses and places to make it happen. We had yoga, food stalls, and even some live music - it was amazing! As for balancing hobbies and studies, I find it helpful to prioritize and manage my time effectively. Making a schedule and setting aside specific time for studying and pursuing hobbies can go a long way in maintaining balance.
[12:52 am on 19 August, 2023] Jolene: Wow, that's awesome! Gonna make a plan to manage my studies and hobbies. Say, do you ever play video games?

[9:11 am on 21 August, 2023] Deborah: Good luck with everything. Stay in touch.
[9:34 am on 24 August, 2023] Deborah: Hey Jolene! Good to hear from you! A lot's happened since we talked - last week I got to go to this yoga retreat near my mom's place. It was so cool - I got to hang with nature and really get to know myself. Definitely life-changing! That's how beautiful it was there!
[9:34 am on 24 August, 2023] Jolene: Wow, Deb, sounds great! Glad you got to connect with yourself and nature. That's my own way to relax. What are your thoughts on life now?
[9:34 am on 24 August, 2023] Deborah: Life's been super meaningful lately. Nature and self-reflection have helped me see how beautiful every moment is. We can really grow and learn when we listen to ourselves. What's been up with you lately? Any insights or experiences?

[9:34 am on 24 August, 2023] Jolene: Life's been hectic, but I'm making strides toward my goals. It's tough, but satisfying.

[11:46 am on 30 August, 2023] Jolene: This country was awesome! It showed me different kinds of yoga and their backgrounds, which made me appreciate it even more. We visited a lot of delicious cafes! Have you ever been somewhere that was important to you?
[11:46 am on 30 August, 2023] Deborah: Yep, last month I visited my mom`s house which holds a special place in my heart. My mom had good and bad times there, but it's still a symbol of her strength and the love she shared with me. This is my husband in front of this house.
[11:46 am on 30 August, 2023] Jolene: What was it like?
[11:46 am on 30 August, 2023] Deborah: It brought back fond memories as I relaxed outside.
[11:46 am on 30 August, 2023] Jolene: Sounds great! So glad you have a place to relax and find peace.

[9:49 am on 27 January, 2023] Deborah: The group members sent this to me! They thanked me for the positive influence I had on them. Those moments remind me why I'm so passionate about yoga.
[9:49 am on 27 January, 2023] Jolene: Where do you most often do yoga?
[9:49 am on 27 January, 2023] Deborah: This is one of the places where I do it.
[9:49 am on 27 January, 2023] Jolene: Where is it?
[9:49 am on 27 January, 2023] Deborah: That's my old home. I go there now and then for my mom, who passed away. Sitting in that spot by the window gives me peace.

[9:17 am on 26 June, 2023] Jolene: Stop talking about me, tell me more about your retreat.
[9:17 am on 26 June, 2023] Deborah: I'd rather show you a photo. This is also a new yoga pose that we tried. It is a tree pose.
[9:17 am on 26 June, 2023] Jolene: What's that statue in the picture?
[9:17 am on 26 June, 2023] Deborah: It's a symbol of peace and enlightenment.
[9:17 am on 26 June, 2023] Jolene: Wow, it looks gorgeous! I'd love to visit a retreat like that. It seems like the ideal spot to find peace and refreshment.

Deborah also visited Rio de Janeiro three years ago and took a photo during one of her excursions there.

[4:30 pm on 9 April, 2023] Deborah: My mom was interested in art. She believed art could give out strong emotions and uniquely connect us. When I go to an art show, it's like we're still experiencing it together even though she's gone. It's hard but comforting.

[8:50 pm on 12 August, 2023] Jolene: Thanks, Deb! I was inspired by my love for space and engines, so I designed these notebooks with elements like galaxies and circuitry. I think they turned out really cool!
[8:50 pm on 12 August, 2023] Deborah: You have such a knack for turning these into art. They make me feel excited just by looking at them. Your creativity is amazing! Does that usually inspire your engineering projects too?
[8:50 pm on 12 August, 2023] Jolene: Seeing art and design in various things gives me a unique perspective on problems.
[8:50 pm on 12 August, 2023] Deborah: Got any neat projects or ideas you're pumped about?
[8:50 pm on 12 August, 2023] Jolene:  Working on a cool project now - a prototype that could revolutionize aerial surveillance. Can't wait to see the results!

[4:50 pm on 25 February, 2023] Jolene: We actually met in an engineering class in college and quickly became friends. It eventually blossomed into something more and it's been great!
[4:50 pm on 25 February, 2023] Deborah: Wow, your relationship started from a strong friendship. Do you still enjoy working on engineering projects together?
[4:50 pm on 25 February, 2023] Jolene: Yep, teaming up for these projects feels great! We get each other's struggles and both love it.
[4:50 pm on 25 February, 2023] Deborah: Have yoga or meditation helped with any stress?
[4:50 pm on 25 February, 2023] Jolene: Whenever I'm overwhelmed, I just take a break and do some breathing or meditate. It really helps me feel calmer and clearer, so I'm able to handle challenges more easily.

[7:03 pm on 1 February, 2023] Jolene: Hi Deb! How're you? I've been busy. My engineering professor gave us a huge robotics project. It's tough but fun, it's making me get creative and problem-solve.
[7:03 pm on 1 February, 2023] Deborah: Hey Jolene! It's great to hear from you. It sounds challenging but interesting! It must be really putting your creative and problem-solving skills to the test. How did you feel when you first received the project? Are you enjoying working on it?
[7:03 pm on 1 February, 2023] Jolene: When I got it, I felt a mix of emotions - excited and nervous. But now, I'm really enjoying it! It's like trying to solve a puzzle, figuring out the best design and programming. Seeing the robot come together is awesome too!
[7:03 pm on 1 February, 2023] Deborah: That's awesome, Jolene! You're enjoying the process. It must be really satisfying to see it come together. Keep up the good work! Oh, by the way, I met my new neighbor Anna yesterday!
[7:03 pm on 1 February, 2023] Jolene: How did you two meet?

[3:56 pm on 6 June, 2023] Jolene: Hey Deborah! Long time no talk - I had lots of stuff going on. Remember the tough engineering project? I finally wrapped that up last month. Look at the result!
[3:56 pm on 6 June, 2023] Deborah: Jolene! Congrats on wrapping up your with it! You really put in the work and it paid off. 
[3:56 pm on 6 June, 2023] Jolene:  I'm really proud of myself for sticking it out despite the problems and finishing it. It's definitely a big milestone.
[3:56 pm on 6 June, 2023] Deborah: Now that you've reached this big milestone, what do you have planned next?
[3:56 pm on 6 June, 2023] Jolene:  I'm interning at a well-known engineering firm. It's been a great opportunity to test my skills and gain real-world experience. These are my new colleagues!

[8:50 pm on 12 August, 2023] Jolene: Seeing art and design in various things gives me a unique perspective on problems.
[8:50 pm on 12 August, 2023] Deborah: Got any neat projects or ideas you're pumped about?
[8:50 pm on 12 August, 2023] Jolene:  Working on a cool project now - a prototype that could revolutionize aerial surveillance. Can't wait to see the results!
[8:50 pm on 12 August, 2023] Deborah: I admire your ambition to make a difference. Do you have any specific plans or goals for this project?
[8:50 pm on 12 August, 2023] Jolene: My aim is to devise a more productive and affordable aerial surveillance system. It'll help with responding to emergencies and monitoring the environment. It'll make the world a better, safer place.

[3:56 pm on 6 June, 2023] Jolene:  I'm interning at a well-known engineering firm. It's been a great opportunity to test my skills and gain real-world experience. These are my new colleagues!
[3:56 pm on 6 June, 2023] Deborah: What's been the best part of it so far?
[3:56 pm on 6 June, 2023] Jolene: The best part so far has been being able to apply what I learned in school to real projects. It's so fulfilling to see my ideas come to life.
[3:56 pm on 6 June, 2023] Deborah: Mind if I ask how the internship has impacted you?
[3:56 pm on 6 June, 2023] Jolene: It has had a positive impact on my life. It has stoked my love of engineering and has encouraged me to keep striving for my dreams.

[5:33 pm on 26 August, 2023] Deborah: When our work ties into our values, it becomes more meaningful. What goals or ideas do you have for incorporating those values into your future projects?
[5:33 pm on 26 August, 2023] Jolene: In the future, I'm aiming to work on projects that make a real difference to communities. I'm interested in sustainable initiatives and developing innovative solutions for environmental issues. I also want to get involved with organizations that focus on social causes, using my skills to help out. It's about connecting my passion for engineering with my commitment to making a positive impact.
[5:33 pm on 26 August, 2023] Deborah: You've got a lot of amazing plans for the future. Which projects are you most interested in getting involved in?
[5:33 pm on 26 August, 2023] Jolene: I'm keen on two projects in particular. One is focused on developing renewable energy, like solar, to help communities and reduce dependence on non-renewables. 
[5:33 pm on 26 August, 2023] Deborah: Wow Jolene, that's really inspiring!

[9:03 pm on 9 February, 2023] Deborah: You deserve credit for stepping outside your comfort zone and believing in yourself. What cool stuff did you accomplish at the retreat?
[9:03 pm on 9 February, 2023] Jolene: I really accomplished something with my engineering project - I came up with some neat solutions and I'm really excited about it.
[9:03 pm on 9 February, 2023] Deborah: Let's go into more detail.
[9:03 pm on 9 February, 2023] Jolene:  Green tech could really make a difference in disadvantaged areas. I'd like to look into it and see how I can contribute. Hey, speaking of helping out, I had an idea: a volunteer program where engineers teach STEM to underprivileged kids. What do you think of that?
[9:03 pm on 9 February, 2023] Deborah: That sounds great, Jolene! It's a great way to help and inspire others. They would benefit a lot from your knowledge. Have you thought of a plan yet?

[4:50 pm on 25 February, 2023] Jolene: We're not married yet but we've been together for three years. We're taking it slow and loving the ride. This ring on his hand is just a decoration, not a wedding ring.
[4:50 pm on 25 February, 2023] Deborah: Sounds nice, Jolene. Enjoying the journey is the main thing. So, how did you two meet?
[4:50 pm on 25 February, 2023] Jolene: We actually met in an engineering class in college and quickly became friends. It eventually blossomed into something more and it's been great!
[4:50 pm on 25 February, 2023] Deborah: Wow, your relationship started from a strong friendship. Do you still enjoy working on engineering projects together?
[4:50 pm on 25 February, 2023] Jolene: Yep, teaming up for these projects feels great! We get each other's struggles and both love it.

[7:37 pm on 9 July, 2023] Deborah: Hey Jolene! I started a running group with Anna - it's awesome connecting with people who care about fitness!
[7:37 pm on 9 July, 2023] Jolene: Cool, Deb! Glad you found some people to get fit with. I'm trying to add workouts into my studying schedule, which has been tough but fun. How about you? Any challenges with the running group?
[7:37 pm on 9 July, 2023] Deborah: Oh, I'm having a blast with it! We help and push each other during our runs, which makes it so much easier to stay motivated.  I have a lot of my photos from this activity.
[7:37 pm on 9 July, 2023] Jolene: Deborah, that's awesome! Being part of a supportive group must be super motivating. Finding a team that's passionate about something makes a huge difference. Just thinking about my own journey too.
[7:37 pm on 9 July, 2023] Deborah: Having people who can cheer you on and give you advice really makes a difference. What has it been like for you finding supportive folks?

[7:37 pm on 9 July, 2023] Deborah: Yep, I do running and yoga/meditation with others. Connecting with people and creating a community is great. Plus, I love organizing workshops and events to practice mindfulness and self-care. It's an awesome way to have fun, build relationships, and support each other's growth.
[7:37 pm on 9 July, 2023] Jolene: Sounds like a great way to relax. What do your workshops and events involve?
[7:37 pm on 9 July, 2023] Deborah: It involves various activities such as yoga, meditation, and self-reflection. They aim to cultivate self-awareness, promote mental and emotional well-being, and help individuals find inner peace. It's a space where people can connect, explore, and grow.
[7:37 pm on 9 July, 2023] Jolene:  Your events are awesome for helping people connect and learn, it is so important. How has everything been going for you?
[7:37 pm on 9 July, 2023] Deborah: Thanks, Jolene! It's been great seeing everyone come together and support each other. It's amazing to witness the growth and transformation that happens through these workshops. I'm honored to be a part of it.

[7:37 pm on 9 July, 2023] Deborah: Yep, I do running and yoga/meditation with others. Connecting with people and creating a community is great. Plus, I love organizing workshops and events to practice mindfulness and self-care. It's an awesome way to have fun, build relationships, and support each other's growth.
[7:37 pm on 9 July, 2023] Jolene: Sounds like a great way to relax. What do your workshops and events involve?
[7:37 pm on 9 July, 2023] Deborah: It involves various activities such as yoga, meditation, and self-reflection. They aim to cultivate self-awareness, promote mental and emotional well-being, and help individuals find inner peace. It's a space where people can connect, explore, and grow.
[7:37 pm on 9 July, 2023] Jolene:  Your events are awesome for helping people connect and learn, it is so important. How has everything been going for you?
[7:37 pm on 9 July, 2023] Deborah: Thanks, Jolene! It's been great seeing everyone come together and support each other. It's amazing to witness the growth and transformation that happens through these workshops. I'm honored to be a part of it.

[7:39 pm on 8 September, 2023] Jolene: My partner and I plan a camping trip to connect with nature and practice yoga.
[7:39 pm on 8 September, 2023] Deborah: It can be both good and tough to plan activities with a busy schedule - what strategies do you use?
[7:39 pm on 8 September, 2023] Jolene: Having a routine helps me stay on top of everything I need to do. I have a schedule for classes, studying, and personal time. Self-care activities like yoga and meditation help me stay balanced and relax.
[7:39 pm on 8 September, 2023] Deborah: I'd love to learn more about how you do it.
[7:39 pm on 8 September, 2023] Jolene:  I can tell you about it if you're interested. It took a bit of experimenting, but it's really helped me.

[9:48 am on 4 February, 2023] Deborah: When things get tough, just take a deep breath and remember why you're doing this. This is where I spend a lot of my time, teaching yoga. It's a great way to find balance and reconnect with ourselves. I bonded with Anna during yesterday's l yoga class.
[9:48 am on 4 February, 2023] Jolene: Wow, that's awesome! What new poses did you try?
[9:48 am on 4 February, 2023] Deborah: We were trying out different dance poses, like Warrior II, which builds strength and boosts focus.
[9:48 am on 4 February, 2023] Jolene: Is it difficult to do?
[9:48 am on 4 February, 2023] Deborah: Yes, but this brought us closer to Anna! We supported each other, that means a lot.

[5:33 pm on 26 August, 2023] Deborah: Sounds great, Jolene! Research is key to success. Little steps and being up for challenges make you stronger. I'm here for you. Connecting to yourself helps tackle any issue. Here's a photo that reminds me of the beauty of nature during a yoga session.
[5:33 pm on 26 August, 2023] Jolene: It helps with challenges, giving balance and strength. Any tips for staying relaxed while studying?
[5:33 pm on 26 August, 2023] Deborah: Taking breaks, doing some stretching/yoga, or just going for a walk is really helpful. And don't forget to get enough sleep and take time for self-care. Finding a balance between work and taking care of yourself is important. What self-care activities have you been doing lately?
[5:33 pm on 26 August, 2023] Jolene: I've been into yoga and meditation lately. It helps me recharge. Doing different poses relieves tension and calms my mind. I've already shared my newfound love for yoga with my partner, and we're planning to go on a meditation retreat together to enhance our practice together.
[5:33 pm on 26 August, 2023] Deborah: Glad to hear that yoga is helping you rest and recharge. It's great for reflection and self-care. Do your snakes also enjoy it?

[4:50 pm on 25 February, 2023] Jolene:  I'm curious, what does your daily routine look like?
[4:50 pm on 25 February, 2023] Deborah: In the morning, I meditate, do yoga, and teach classes. And yesterday I went for a morning jog for the first time in a nearby park. I will now incorporate this into my daily routine. And in the evenings, I spend time with loved ones.
[4:50 pm on 25 February, 2023] Jolene: Why did you decide that?
[4:50 pm on 25 February, 2023] Deborah: Exercise is key for me - it makes me feel connected to my body. 
[4:50 pm on 25 February, 2023] Jolene: This is a great healthy habit!

[4:06 pm on 23 January, 2023] Deborah: One of my goals is to keep teaching yoga and supporting my community. I'm passionate about helping people find peace and joy through it.
[4:06 pm on 23 January, 2023] Jolene: What inspired you to go down this route?
[4:06 pm on 23 January, 2023] Deborah: Yoga helped me find peace during a rough time, and now I'm passionate about sharing that with others.

[4:06 pm on 23 January, 2023] Deborah: Hey Jolene, nice to meet you! How's your week going? Anything fun happened?
[4:06 pm on 23 January, 2023] Jolene: Hi Deb! Good to meet you! Yeah, my week's been busy. I finished an electrical engineering project last week - took a lot of work, but it's done now. Anything fun happening for you?
[4:06 pm on 23 January, 2023] Deborah: Congrats! Last week I visited a place that holds a lot of memories for me. It was my mother`s old house.

[3:56 pm on 6 June, 2023] Jolene:  I'm interning at a well-known engineering firm. It's been a great opportunity to test my skills and gain real-world experience. These are my new colleagues!
[3:56 pm on 6 June, 2023] Deborah: What's been the best part of it so far?

results.question: Which show did Deborah go to with a friend on 9 April, 2023?
results.predicted: Deborah went to an art show with a friend on 9 April, 2023. She described it as "really cool and inspiring stuff" that reminded her of her mom.
chunks:
[4:30 pm on 9 April, 2023] Deborah: Hey Jolene! Great to see you! Had a blast biking nearby with my neighbor last week - was so freeing and beautiful. Checked out an art show with a friend today - really cool and inspiring stuff. Reminded me of my mom.
[4:30 pm on 9 April, 2023] Jolene: Hey Deborah! Sounds like you had a blast biking and at the art show. Your photo looks like you were really into it! Did it make you think profound thoughts?
[4:30 pm on 9 April, 2023] Deborah: My mom was interested in art. She believed art could give out strong emotions and uniquely connect us. When I go to an art show, it's like we're still experiencing it together even though she's gone. It's hard but comforting.
[4:30 pm on 9 April, 2023] Jolene: Losing someone is hard, but finding something that helps you cope is great.
[4:30 pm on 9 April, 2023] Deborah: Finding ways to keep her memory alive gives me peace. It's amazing how something simple like artwork can bring back powerful emotions and remind us of those we've lost. It's about finding solace in the things we love, and art has done that for me.

[4:03 pm on 28 March, 2023] Jolene: Thanks for the tips, Deborah! I'm gonna check them out. It's always good to have some new tunes for yoga!
[4:03 pm on 28 March, 2023] Deborah:  Let me know your thoughts on the albums!
[4:03 pm on 28 March, 2023] Jolene: See you!
[4:03 pm on 28 March, 2023] Deborah: Take care and keep up the good work!

[4:30 pm on 9 April, 2023] Deborah: My mom was interested in art. She believed art could give out strong emotions and uniquely connect us. When I go to an art show, it's like we're still experiencing it together even though she's gone. It's hard but comforting.
[4:30 pm on 9 April, 2023] Jolene: Losing someone is hard, but finding something that helps you cope is great.
[4:30 pm on 9 April, 2023] Deborah: Finding ways to keep her memory alive gives me peace. It's amazing how something simple like artwork can bring back powerful emotions and remind us of those we've lost. It's about finding solace in the things we love, and art has done that for me.
[4:30 pm on 9 April, 2023] Jolene: Even though my snakes can't chat or understand what I'm going through, our time together is valuable and teaches me to take time and be in tune with myself. Similarly, playing video games with my partner after a long day is a great way for me to relax.
[4:30 pm on 9 April, 2023] Deborah: Simple things can indeed bring us the most happiness. How have these activities helped you during tough times?

[4:30 pm on 9 April, 2023] Deborah: I am waiting to hear how everything turns out. Keep up the good work!
[4:30 pm on 9 April, 2023] Jolene: Thanks Deb! Your support means a lot. I'll keep you updated on the progress of the project.
[4:30 pm on 9 April, 2023] Deborah: Glad my support means a lot to you! I'll always be here for you. 
[4:30 pm on 9 April, 2023] Jolene: Take care!
[4:30 pm on 9 April, 2023] Deborah: Enjoy your day and make time for the things that bring you joy. See ya!

[4:30 pm on 9 April, 2023] Deborah: Simple things can indeed bring us the most happiness. How have these activities helped you during tough times?
[4:30 pm on 9 April, 2023] Jolene: It brings us closer together!

[4:30 pm on 9 April, 2023] Deborah: I am waiting to hear how everything turns out. Keep up the good work!

[4:12 pm on 22 February, 2023] Jolene: Hey Deborah, totally buzzing! Had a great night out last night - dinner, and drinks with my friends. So glad I got to let my hair down. You?
[4:12 pm on 22 February, 2023] Deborah: Sounds great, Jolene! I just visited this place and it was so calming. Nostalgic too.
[4:12 pm on 22 February, 2023] Jolene: Wow, those flowers are beautiful! What type are they? It looks so peaceful there.
[4:12 pm on 22 February, 2023] Deborah: The roses and dahlias bring me peace. I lost a friend last week, so I've been spending time in the garden to find some comfort.
[4:12 pm on 22 February, 2023] Jolene: Sorry to hear about your friend, Deb. Losing someone can be really tough. How are you holding up?

[3:09 pm on 15 September, 2023] Jolene: That looks like a blast! What did you and your mom's friends do on that day?
[3:09 pm on 15 September, 2023] Deborah: We reminisced and looked through her photos. It was really sweet.
[3:09 pm on 15 September, 2023] Jolene: Looking at old photos must have been so nostalgic! It's great that you could share that experience with friends. It's amazing how photos and memories can give us a deeper appreciation for the people we love.
[3:09 pm on 15 September, 2023] Deborah: Pictures really have a way of bringing back memories and making us appreciate the special bond we have with our loved ones. They remind me of how strong love is and how amazing human relationships can be. Just like this one.

results.question: What is special about the bench at the park near Deborah's house?

results.predicted: The bench at the park holds special memories for Deborah and her mom—they would come there to chat about dreams and life. One of her favorite memories is watching a beautiful sunset together in silence, and now when she visits, she feels peace and gratitude for the time she spent with her mother there.
chunks:
[12:52 am on 19 August, 2023] Jolene: I'm a big fan of being outside too! It's so calming and refreshing. Do you have any special spots you like to go to?
[12:52 am on 19 August, 2023] Deborah: I love going to this park near my house - it has a nice forest trail and a beach. It's a peaceful spot where I can do some yoga and reflect. There's also a special bench that holds special meaning to me.
[12:52 am on 19 August, 2023] Jolene: Sounds lovely! Nature can be calming. What makes this bench special to you?
[12:52 am on 19 August, 2023] Deborah: It holds a lot of special memories for me and my mom - we would come here and chat about dreams and life. It's full of good moments. 
[12:52 am on 19 August, 2023] Jolene: That's awesome, Deborah! What were some of your favorite memories with your mom at this spot? It looks super peaceful and pretty.

[4:06 pm on 23 January, 2023] Deborah: My mom's house had a special bench near the window. She loved to sit there every morning and take in the view. I come to sit here sometimes, it helps me stay connected to her.
[4:06 pm on 23 January, 2023] Jolene: Staying connected is super important. Do you have something to remember her by? This pendant reminds me of my mother, she gave it to me in 2010  in Paris.

[2:14 pm on 3 September, 2023] Deborah: Relationships with family and friends are so vital. My yoga pals have been my second family - we've held each other up through a lot. The other day I found this old photo. That was when I first started doing yoga. My mum was my biggest fan and source of motivation. She'd often come to my classes with me.

results.question: Why did Jolene have to reschedule their meeting with Deborah on September 8, 2023?
results.predicted: Based on the memories, Jolene did not reschedule the meeting—it was Deborah who had to reschedule. On September 8, 2023, Deborah said "Sorry, I remembered that I already have plans for this day," which is why they needed to find a different time to meet.
chunks:
[2:18 pm on 12 September, 2023] Jolene: I look forward to meeting you and playing this game!
[3:09 pm on 15 September, 2023] Deborah: Since speaking last, I reconnected with my mom's old friends. Their stories made me tear up and reminded me how lucky I am to have had her.
[3:09 pm on 15 September, 2023] Jolene:  It's great that you could reconnect with them. Hearing stories about our loved ones can be tough but also comforting.
[3:09 pm on 15 September, 2023] Deborah: Hearing stories about my mom was emotional. It was both happy and sad to hear things I hadn't heard before. It was a mix of emotions, but overall it was comforting to reconnect with her friends.
[3:09 pm on 15 September, 2023] Jolene: It can bring up a range of emotions, and it's okay to feel a mix of happiness and sadness. Those moments with her friends must've been meaningful to you.

[8:31 pm on 6 September, 2023] Deborah: See ya! Stay safe and catch you later. Bye!
[7:39 pm on 8 September, 2023] Deborah: Hey Jolene, had a tough week. Storm forced us to cancel our yoga getaway.
[7:39 pm on 8 September, 2023] Jolene: Sorry to hear about it. How are you feeling now?
[7:39 pm on 8 September, 2023] Deborah: I was bummed about it, but I'm doing better now. It was just a setback, but I found comfort in my work and spending time at home. Reminds me to be grateful for the little things. And you? How's it going?
[7:39 pm on 8 September, 2023] Jolene: My partner and I plan a camping trip to connect with nature and practice yoga.

[8:31 pm on 6 September, 2023] Deborah: Glad it brought back good memories. 
[8:31 pm on 6 September, 2023] Jolene: Maybe one day we will be able to watch the sunrise together!
[8:31 pm on 6 September, 2023] Deborah: An offer I can't refuse!
[8:31 pm on 6 September, 2023] Jolene: Bye, Deb! See you later!
[8:31 pm on 6 September, 2023] Deborah: See ya! Stay safe and catch you later. Bye!

[7:39 pm on 8 September, 2023] Jolene: Tell me more about it when we meet, maybe next time we’ll be there.

[7:39 pm on 8 September, 2023] Jolene: How about Wednesday at 4? Can't wait to catch up over coffee!
[7:39 pm on 8 September, 2023] Deborah: That pic looks so peaceful. Reminded me of a cool hidden coffee shop near me. Rate it!
[7:39 pm on 8 September, 2023] Jolene: Tell me more about it when we meet, maybe next time we’ll be there.

[2:18 pm on 12 September, 2023] Jolene: Thanks, Deb! Appreciate your support. It's great that we can do this together.

[3:09 pm on 15 September, 2023] Deborah: Since speaking last, I reconnected with my mom's old friends. Their stories made me tear up and reminded me how lucky I am to have had her.
[3:09 pm on 15 September, 2023] Jolene:  It's great that you could reconnect with them. Hearing stories about our loved ones can be tough but also comforting.

[2:14 pm on 3 September, 2023] Deborah: What's up this month? Anything fun happening for you?

Amazing experience! Nature, reflection and a break from engineering studies were awesome - it helped me find inner peace.
[2:18 pm on 12 September, 2023] Deborah:  I'd love to hear more about your reflections there and how they changed you.
[2:18 pm on 12 September, 2023] Jolene: At the retreat, I had time to reflect on what makes me happy. It made me realize the importance of incorporating relaxation, self-care, and balance in life alongside my engineering studies. The beauty of nature there was so inspiring and refreshing!

[11:46 am on 30 August, 2023] Jolene: Thanks Deb! Will do. Good talking to you. Take care!
[11:46 am on 30 August, 2023] Deborah: Have a great day!
[2:14 pm on 3 September, 2023] Deborah: Hey Jolene, just catching up. I went to a cool event last week with the aim to support each other - pretty inspiring. Have you been connecting with anyone lately?

[8:31 pm on 6 September, 2023] Jolene: Glimpsing that calms me. Taking beach walks relaxes me.

chunks:
[2:18 pm on 12 September, 2023] Jolene: Hey Deb! So sorry for the late reply, been super busy. Last weekend my partner and I traveled to a meditation retreat for a few weeks in Phuket. Amazing experience! Nature, reflection and a break from engineering studies were awesome - it helped me find inner peace.
[2:18 pm on 12 September, 2023] Deborah:  I'd love to hear more about your reflections there and how they changed you.
[2:18 pm on 12 September, 2023] Jolene: At the retreat, I had time to reflect on what makes me happy. It made me realize the importance of incorporating relaxation, self-care, and balance in life alongside my engineering studies. The beauty of nature there was so inspiring and refreshing!
[2:18 pm on 12 September, 2023] Deborah:  Was there anything from the retreat that stood out to you?
[2:18 pm on 12 September, 2023] Jolene: The one session that really stood out was about releasing expectations and judgments and just savoring the present. It was a strong reminder to not just dwell on the finish line, but to appreciate the journey too. I usually get too consumed with hitting my goals that I forget to appreciate the ride.

[10:17 am on 20 September, 2023] Jolene: Wow, festivals sound so fun! Here's me and my partner at one last year - had an awesome time! It's my way of expressing myself and getting away from all the stress of everyday life. Just got back from a trip with my partner - so cool!
[10:17 am on 20 September, 2023] Deborah: Wow, what a gorgeous shot! It looks so tranquil and serene. You two look very happy together. Trips create awesome memories that we can share. Where did you go on your trip and what's something you'll never forget?
[10:17 am on 20 September, 2023] Jolene: Thanks! We had an awesome yoga retreat. The place was so peaceful and the view during yoga was amazing - the sunrise lit up the whole sky with bright colors. It was so beautiful, it made us feel so alive and grateful.
[10:17 am on 20 September, 2023] Deborah: Wow, what a view!  How did it make you feel?
[10:17 am on 20 September, 2023] Jolene: It was amazing! Doing yoga with that backdrop made me feel connected to nature and myself. I felt incredibly peaceful and thankful.

[7:39 pm on 8 September, 2023] Jolene: My partner and I plan a camping trip to connect with nature and practice yoga.
[7:39 pm on 8 September, 2023] Deborah: It can be both good and tough to plan activities with a busy schedule - what strategies do you use?
[7:39 pm on 8 September, 2023] Jolene: Having a routine helps me stay on top of everything I need to do. I have a schedule for classes, studying, and personal time. Self-care activities like yoga and meditation help me stay balanced and relax.
[7:39 pm on 8 September, 2023] Deborah: I'd love to learn more about how you do it.
[7:39 pm on 8 September, 2023] Jolene:  I can tell you about it if you're interested. It took a bit of experimenting, but it's really helped me.
